hero.subtitle: We maximize your business potential with efficient, custom IT solutions tailored to your needs.

services.title: Comprehensive IT Solutions for Business
services.subtitle: We help companies build reliable IT infrastructure, automate sales and processes, implement CRM systems, and develop digital solutions for business growth.

items.title: IT Infrastructure
items.description: We design and deploy on-premise and cloud infrastructure: servers, networks, workstations, access control, and IT architecture for stable business operations.

items.title: Managed IT Services (MSP)
items.description: We handle daily IT support and management by subscription: 24/7 monitoring, user support, fast response, and full responsibility for stability.

items.title: CRM & Sales Automation
items.description: We implement AmoCRM, automate sales pipelines, and connect telephony, messengers, your website, and other channels into one unified lead management system.

items.title: Business Process Automation
items.description: We automate manual processes using bots, integrations, AI tools, and internal systems so your business runs faster, cleaner, and more efficiently.

items.title: Custom Software Development
items.description: We build websites, landing pages, Telegram bots, Mini Apps, mobile apps, complex integrations, and custom business systems tailored to your company.

items.title: IT Audit & Consulting
items.description: We audit your IT infrastructure and processes, identify weak points, risks, and growth opportunities, then deliver a clear optimization and development plan.

hero.title: We Build IT Systems That Work for You
hero.subtitle: ITHINK is a Tashkent-based IT company helping businesses digitalize, automate, and scale since 2012.

story.title: Building Digital Futures Since 2012
story.p1: ITHINK was founded with a single mission: help Uzbek businesses harness the power of modern technology. From setting up networks in small offices to building complex enterprise software, we've grown alongside our clients.
story.p2: Today, we're a full-service IT partner for companies across industries — from retail and finance to manufacturing and professional services. Our team combines technical depth with business understanding to deliver solutions that actually move the needle.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: We show up, we follow through, and we stand behind every solution we deliver.

items.title: Clarity
items.description: No jargon, no hidden costs. You always know what we're doing and why.

items.title: Partnership
items.description: We treat your business goals as our own. Your success is our benchmark.

hero.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing

plans.name: Landing Page

plans.name: Web Application

plans.name: E-Commerce & Marketplace

items.q: What's included in the initial price?
items.a: The listed prices are starting points. Final cost depends on scope, number of pages, integrations, and complexity. We provide a detailed quote after a discovery call.
Managed IT and VoIP are monthly services. One-time projects (websites, software) can be paired with an optional support plan billed monthly.
We accept bank transfer, Payme, and Click. For larger projects, we work on a milestone-based payment schedule.

items.q: Can I start small and scale up?
items.a: Absolutely. Many clients start with a landing page or basic IT setup and expand over time. Our solutions are designed to grow with you.

benefits.title: No Hiring Costs

benefits.description: Scale up or down based on your current needs. Monthly contracts, no lock-ins.

hero.title: Websites That Work for Your Business
hero.subtitle: From simple landing pages to full-scale e-commerce platforms, we build the web presence you need.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We learn your business, goals, and audience to define the right scope.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Wireframes and visual design tailored to your brand identity.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Clean code, fast performance, mobile-first responsive development.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Deployment, testing, and handover with documentation and training.

items.q: How long does it take to build a website?
items.a: Landing pages typically take 1–2 weeks. Web applications 4–8 weeks depending on complexity. We provide a detailed timeline after scoping.
We primarily use Next.js, React, and Node.js. For e-commerce we integrate with local payment gateways (Payme, Click) and can connect to any CRM or ERP.
We recommend and set up hosting on Vercel, AWS, or a VPS depending on your needs. We can manage it for you or hand it over to your team.

items.q: Can you redesign an existing website?
items.a: Yes. We do full redesigns with content migration, performance optimization, and SEO improvement.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about working with ITHINK.

items.q: What types of businesses do you work with?
items.a: We work with businesses of all sizes across retail, e-commerce, finance, professional services, manufacturing, and more. If you need IT solutions, we can help.

items.q: How is ITHINK different from other IT companies?
items.a: We combine technical depth with business understanding. We don't just install software — we understand your workflows and design solutions that fit. Every client gets a dedicated account manager.
Yes. We build custom web applications, internal tools, and integrations. Our development process includes requirements gathering, design, development, testing, and post-launch support.

items.q: What technologies do you specialize in?
items.a: On the infrastructure side: networking, VoIP, cloud services. On the software side: Next.js, React, Node.js, Python, and database design. For CRM: amoCRM, Bitrix24, and related integrations.

items.q: How do you handle ongoing support?
items.a: We offer monthly support plans with defined SLA response times. Critical issues are addressed within 2–4 hours, standard issues within 1 business day.
Pricing depends on scope, complexity, and timeline. We provide detailed quotes after a free discovery call. No hidden fees — what we quote is what you pay.
Fill out the contact form or call us directly. We'll schedule a 30-minute discovery call to understand your needs and recommend a solution.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Our primary focus is Uzbekistan, but we work with clients across Central Asia and accept international projects for software development and CRM implementation.
